objective: ABC Co., Ltd. is exploring options for procuring IT Equipment for the 5-person dev team. We need to understand vendor capabilities before issuing a formal RFQ.
informationRequested: Experience supplying Laptop / IT Equipment to organizations (years in business, number of clients)
Brands and models available with specs (minimum 2 options)
After-sales services: warranty period, on-site service, response time
Company information: business registration, contacts, website
notes: This RFI is not a price solicitation. Submitting information incurs no cost. The company reserves the right to contact some or all respondents for additional information. Expected outcome: Shortlist of 3-5 vendors for subsequent RFQ.
